result.analysis: Etap blocks Gemini batchexecute requests aggressively (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED, ERR_CONNECTION_RESET, ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR). This causes cascade failure: (1) page background requests fail, (2) error reporting (jserror) also blocked, (3) page functionality degrades to the point where the send button becomes non-functional. Strategy D (h2_mode=1) appears to be blocking too broadly - not just the prompt POST but also Gemini's background polling/session requests.
console_errors: Connecting /app:1 violates Content Security Policy directive: connect-src
recommendations: Strategy D blocks too broadly - background polling requests are also caught
Need to narrow path_patterns to only match prompt-containing batchexecute requests
Consider allowing non-prompt batchexecute requests to pass through
The cascade failure prevents both warning display AND prompt submission
Compare with previous result #255 (B14) which also showed ERR_CONNECTION_RESET
